title: Power Masks!
description: Powerful Masks that give you benefits that may come with a curse
body:
This mod was made with MCreator, check out the project here: https://mcreator.net

You've ever wanted to have masks on minecraft? no? i dont care!

Masks made with the magical properties off ender pearls(? and lapis lazuli, introducing...

POWER MASKS!!!(version 1.1)

Mask Core:
The heart of any mask that exists in this mod, no masks would work if it weren't for the Mask Core

Midas/Gold Mask:
This mask makes you a lot faster but makes you more tired and makes you hungry(Grants Haste and Hunger)

Knight/Iron Mask:
This mask grants you resistance and speed but it makes your arms weaker and makes you practically unable to mine (Grants Speed,Resistance and Mining fatigue)

Infernal/obsidian Mask:
grants you a lot of strength but makes you significantly heavier(Grants Strength and Slowness)

Happy/Emerald Mask:
This mask seems to be very appealing and protector-like to villagers and also to grants you the ability of being very light, making you able to jump very high but because you're really light you will be less likely to deal damage to anything (Grants Hero of the Village, Jump Boost and Weakness)

Red/Redstone Mask:
Grants you the ability of healing yourself very fast but, you cant really see through the mask and your armos seem a lot more weaker than usual(Grants Regeneration, Blindness and Weakness)

Celestial/Diamond Mask:
You feel a lot stronger and tough but the mask is heavy(Grants Stength, Resistance and Slowness)
Crystal Mask

Crystal Mask:
You and other creatures cant see your body except the eyes of the Mask(Grants invisibility but the eyes of the mask are still present)
